seoTitle: Sheedys Gully vs Shellharbour — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sheedys Gully and Shellharbour. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sheedys Gully vs Shellharbour: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sheedys Gully and Shellharbour.
heading: Sheedys Gully vs Shellharbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sheedys Gully, New South Wales and Shellharbour, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shellharbour has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Sheedys Gully (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sheedys Gully or Shellharbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sheedys Gully has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Shellharbour scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sheedys Gully scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Shellharbour scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sheedys Gully or Shellharbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shellharbour has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
